issueTitle: Missing source reference for DSCSA Section 582 obligation
issueDescription: Obligation CM-0001 references DSCSA Section 582 but has no linked source record in the Source Registry.
recommendedAction: Locate and register the official DSCSA Section 582 source document in the Source Registry. Link to obligation CM-0001.
riskIfUnresolved: Obligation cannot be traced to authoritative source text. Audit finding risk.

issueTitle: Incomplete metadata on EU AI Act source record
issueDescription: Source record SRC-005 is missing publication date and effective date fields.
recommendedAction: Complete publication date and effective date metadata for SRC-005.
riskIfUnresolved: Incomplete source metadata undermines validation readiness.

issueTitle: Low confidence mapping for ICH Q12 obligation
issueDescription: Obligation CM-0072 has a confidence level of low. The plain-English interpretation may not accurately reflect the source language.
recommendedAction: Engage legal/regulatory SME to validate the plain-English interpretation against source language.
riskIfUnresolved: Misinterpreted obligation could lead to incorrect controls and evidence requirements.

issueTitle: Obligation CM-0088 missing linked control
issueDescription: High-severity obligation CM-0088 has no linked compliance control in the Controls layer.
affectedEntityLabel: EU GMP Annex 1 — Contamination Control Strategy
recommendedAction: Create a compliance control for contamination control strategy and link to CM-0088.
riskIfUnresolved: Critical obligation has no operational control. Regulatory inspection finding risk.

issueTitle: Control CTRL-003 missing required evidence
issueDescription: Control CTRL-003 (Cold Chain Monitoring) is linked to EVD-005 and EVD-006, but EVD-005 has status missing.
recommendedAction: Initiate collection of Cold Chain Validation Protocol evidence. Assign to evidence owner.
riskIfUnresolved: Control cannot demonstrate effectiveness without supporting evidence.

issueTitle: Evidence EVD-016 expired
issueDescription: Evidence item EVD-016 (Annual GMP Self-Inspection Report) has expired status. Retention period may have lapsed.
recommendedAction: Recollect or renew the Annual GMP Self-Inspection Report. Update evidence status.
riskIfUnresolved: Expired evidence cannot support linked control in an audit.

issueTitle: Control CTRL-002 is deficient
issueDescription: Control CTRL-002 (Serialization System Validation) has deficient status and high risk level.
recommendedAction: Complete serialization system revalidation. Execute IQ/OQ/PQ protocol.
riskIfUnresolved: DSCSA compliance gap. FDA enforcement risk.

issueTitle: Draft change DC-002 stalled in review
issueDescription: Draft regulatory change DC-002 has been in review stage for over 30 days without progression.
recommendedAction: Escalate draft DC-002 for review completion. Assign reviewer and set deadline.
riskIfUnresolved: Regulatory update not reflected in active reference data. Compliance gap risk.

issueTitle: Stale review on 12 obligations
issueDescription: 12 obligations have not been reviewed in the last 180 days. lastReviewedDate is either null or older than 2025-11-01.
recommendedAction: Schedule periodic review cycle for all obligations older than 180 days.
riskIfUnresolved: Stale obligations may not reflect current regulatory requirements.

issueTitle: Legal review required for EU AI Act impact analysis
issueDescription: Impact analysis RIA-003 covers EU AI Act changes but has not undergone formal legal review.
recommendedAction: Engage legal counsel for formal review of EU AI Act impact assessment.
riskIfUnresolved: Impact analysis may contain incorrect legal interpretations.

issueTitle: Version gap: CM-0045 has no version history
issueDescription: Obligation CM-0045 has versionNumber 1.0 but no corresponding entry in the Version History log.
recommendedAction: Create initial version history entry for CM-0045 in the Version History log.
riskIfUnresolved: Incomplete audit trail for obligation lifecycle.
notes: Low priority — version history is informational at pilot stage.

issueTitle: Unmapped business function: Risk
issueDescription: The Risk function appears in function selectors but has no sample obligations, controls, evidence, or actions assigned.
recommendedAction: Add sample obligation, control, and evidence records for the Risk function, or add clear empty-state messaging.
riskIfUnresolved: Users selecting Risk function filter see empty results with no explanation.

issueTitle: Legacy Evidence Register page naming confusion
issueDescription: The /evidence route (Evidence Register) and /controls-evidence Evidence tab cover overlapping concepts with different data models.
recommendedAction: Rename /evidence sidebar label to Evidence Register (Legacy). Add clarifying subtitle or tooltip.
riskIfUnresolved: Users may confuse two different evidence views, leading to incorrect data interpretation.
notes: Carried forward from Phase 1.4 QA review.

issueTitle: Evidence EVD-011 rejected — needs re-collection
issueDescription: Evidence item EVD-011 has rejected status. The related control CTRL-006 cannot demonstrate effectiveness.
recommendedAction: Re-collect supplier qualification audit records. Address rejection reasons before resubmission.
riskIfUnresolved: Supplier oversight control has no valid supporting evidence.

issueTitle: Crosswalk area CW-003 has weak linkage
issueDescription: Crosswalk area CW-003 references standards that are not fully mapped to obligations or controls.
recommendedAction: Complete standard-to-obligation mapping for cold chain crosswalk area CW-003.
riskIfUnresolved: Incomplete crosswalk reduces traceability across regulatory frameworks.

issueTitle: Audit gap: no audit events for CTRL-007
issueDescription: Control CTRL-007 has no entries in the Audit Log. All control lifecycle changes should be tracked.
recommendedAction: Ensure audit log captures control lifecycle events for CTRL-007.
riskIfUnresolved: Incomplete audit trail for control changes.

issueTitle: Source SRC-003 requires legal review
issueDescription: Source record SRC-003 (21 CFR Part 211) is linked to multiple high-risk obligations but has not undergone formal legal review.
affectedEntityLabel: 21 CFR Part 211 — cGMP for Finished Pharmaceuticals
recommendedAction: Schedule legal review of SRC-003 source material and linked obligation interpretations.
riskIfUnresolved: Obligations derived from unreviewed source may contain interpretation errors.

issueTitle: Executive Leadership function has no mapped obligations
issueDescription: The Executive Leadership business function appears in selectors but has zero obligations, controls, or evidence assigned.
recommendedAction: Add sample records or clear empty-state messaging for Executive Leadership function.
riskIfUnresolved: Users see empty results with no explanation when filtering by this function.
notes: Known sample data limitation. Does not mean this function has no real-world obligations.

issueTitle: Obligation CM-0003 missing evidence linkage
issueDescription: Obligation CM-0003 (DSCSA Verification) has a linked control but no evidence requirements mapped.
recommendedAction: Define and link evidence requirements for obligation CM-0003 product verification.
riskIfUnresolved: Cannot demonstrate compliance without evidence trail.

issueTitle: Unmapped business function: Procurement oversight gaps
issueDescription: Procurement function has 2 controls and 3 evidence items but no linked impact analyses or regulatory updates.
recommendedAction: Review whether active regulatory updates affect Procurement and link relevant impact analyses.
riskIfUnresolved: Procurement may miss regulatory changes that affect supplier oversight obligations.
